_meta.purpose: Public-response-shape SoT after the ADDITIVE envelope-shared `_receipts` block. ADDITIVE-ONLY: top level gains `_receipts` (sibling of `_algovault`); content gains an optional 2nd text item (proof footer). NO existing field removed/renamed. outcome_* must NEVER appear.

receipts_shape_decision: ENVELOPE-SHARED (the lower-token option per the wave spec). Each calls[] row already stands alone with its own verdict (`call`) + conviction (`confidence`) + regime; the proof (track_record + verify link + disclaimer) is shared ONCE at the envelope `_receipts`. A row + this envelope (and the content[1] proof footer) stands alone in a screenshot. NO per-row receipt duplication.

new_in_this_wave._receipts: ADDITIVE envelope block {track_record?, verification_uri, disclaimer}. Present on the success envelope only (NOT on the quota_exhausted error envelope).
new_in_this_wave._receipts.track_record: LIVE {pfe_win_rate (fraction), n (EVALUATED), window, as_of} from the in-process performance source (cached warmer, NOT an HTTP self-call). OMITTED fail-open when unavailable.
new_in_this_wave.content[1]: ADDITIVE optional 2nd MCP text item = the proof footer ('Proof: …Verify → …'), present only when track_record is available. content[0] remains the JSON envelope unchanged.

error_contract.quota_exhausted: {error:'quota_exhausted', code:'tier_limit_reached', message, quota:{used,total,remaining}, suggested_action, _algovault:{tool,version,session_id}} — NO _receipts on this envelope.

cache_contract: no server-side response cache; scanner computes per-call. _receipts.track_record read from the 15m in-process warmer (fail-open to omitted).
consumers: future P2 landing scanner card — consumes the same envelope _receipts shape
additive_only_rule: top level may GAIN `_receipts` but never LOSE/RENAME the 7 pre-existing keys; calls[] item shape unchanged; content[0] stays the JSON envelope. A removed/renamed key or a forbidden_key under _receipts = Data Integrity violation → HALT.
drift_check_command: cd /Users/tank/code/crypto-quant-signal-mcp && npx vitest run tests/unit/receipts.test.ts   # formatScanReceipts allow-list (track_record/verification_uri/disclaimer only; no outcome_*) + fail-open omission
live_probe_command: SID=$(curl -s -D- -o/dev/null -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"drift","version":"1"}}}' | tr -d '\r' | awk -F': ' '/^mcp-session-id/{print $2}'); curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H "Mcp-Session-Id: $SID" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"notifications/initialized"}' >/dev/null; curl -s -X POST https://api.algovault.com/mcp -H "Mcp-Session-Id: $SID" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Accept: application/json, text/event-stream' -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"scan_trade_calls","arguments":{"topN":5,"timeframe":"15m"}}}' | grep -o '_receipts[^}]*verification_uri[^,]*'   # expect envelope _receipts with verification_uri == https://algovault.com/track-record; assert NO outcome_return_pct
